disambiguated.context: The clinic had recently run some standard STD testing for two new clients, one of them lesbian and the other bisexual. The doctor called the lesbian client first to report positive test results and talk about treatment options, then was able to have a much shorter call with the bisexual one whose results were all negative.
disambiguated.question: Who has an STD?
